title: Reserve Bank of India (NBFC-UL Scale Based Regulation) Amendment Directions 2026
source_url: Not directly accessible; refer to RBI official notifications portal
description: RBI replaces the complex NBFC-UL scoring methodology with a simple ₹1,00,000 crore asset threshold. The amendment brings Government NBFCs under Scale Based Regulation and withdraws their concentration norm exemptions, effective June 24, 2026.
